delta_feas_headline.note: shared bands (T <= 0.05, O95 <= 120 h); axes differ by design (p_w x p_f vs regime x tempo) — cell-addressable comparison via the shipped tables

gates.registered: |T_S - T_A| <= 1.0 pp AND |O95_S - O95_A| <= max(4 h, 5%), every point; effective tolerance = max(registered, 2.5 x predicted SE) per the fixtures pre-check rule

model_basis.behavioral_assumption: deterministic-cadence wakes x i.i.d. forgets x Poisson contender checks are the neutral choices; the lattice structure is what makes Arm A an exact finite DP
model_basis.most_likely_to_flip: the real forget process — correlated forgetting sits between the i.i.d. sweep and lane death, and is exactly what the warn-first live counter measures the day the renewed: field ships

reporting_only.C48_identity: O95 = theta + ln(20)/lambda_c >= theta + 143.79514913059157 h > 120 h at lambda_c = 1/48 for ANY theta >= 0 (V027 hand pin 3, restated by citation, never re-run)
reporting_only.note: registered as unable to flip the decision
